title: nassella macrathera
intro: Nassella macrathera, also known as Needle-and-thread grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nassella macrathera include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can prevent infections. Nassella macrathera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
